name: Full Page Screenshot
description_en: Capture a full-length PNG screenshot of any web page—covering everything below the fold—by driving Chrome directly over the DevTools Protocol, handling SPA scroll containers, lazy-loaded images, and tall-page stitching.
description_zh: 对任意网页生成一张完整长截图 PNG(覆盖需要滚动才能看到的全部内容)——直连 Chrome DevTools 协议驱动浏览器,自动处理 SPA 内部滚动容器、懒加载图片与超长页面分片拼接。
long_en: Connects straight to the Chrome DevTools WebSocket with no CDP proxy or middleware, so it works on an already-open tab or a given URL with only Node and Chrome's remote debugging.
long_zh: 直连 Chrome DevTools WebSocket,无需 CDP 代理或中间层,只要 Node 与 Chrome 远程调试即可对已打开的标签页或指定 URL 截图。
sec_note_en: Requires Node 22+ and Chrome started with remote debugging; it controls your local Chrome session and only fetches the page you point it at.
sec_note_zh: 需要 Node 22+ 与开启远程调试的 Chrome;会控制你本地的 Chrome 会话,仅抓取你指定的页面。
